name: Panchito Riset
abstract: Francisco Hilario Riser Rincón (1910–1988), better known as Panchito Riset, was a Cuban singer, highly regarded for his interpretation of boleros in the pre-war period. He was born in the Atarés district of Havana.

concerts.label: La Primerisima: First Spanish Festival of Song

about_quotes.speaker: Frank "Machito" Grillo
